title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_November 5, 2024] 2024 Yangtze River Delta Science and Technology Innovation Community Joint Research (Basic Research) Project – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_November 5, 2024] 2024 Yangtze River Delta Science and Technology Innovation Community Joint Research (Basic Research) Project
The Shanghai Municipal Science and Technology Commission, Jiangsu Provincial Department of Science and Technology, and Anhui Provincial Department of Science and Technology are calling for proposals for 2024 Yangtze River Delta Science and Technology Innovation Community Joint Research (Basic Research) Project 2024年度长三角科技创新共同体联合攻关（基础研究）项目
You could visit their official website and log into your personal account for more information: 2024年度长三角科技创新共同体联合攻关（基础研究）项目
Scope of Solicitation:
This guide targets fields such as integrated circuits and electronic information, new materials and advanced manufacturing, population and health, biology and agriculture, and environment and ecology. It focuses on the critical strategic needs of the Yangtze River Delta region, aiming to deeply explore and define fundamental scientific questions. The initiative organizes and supports leading teams to jointly conduct application-oriented basic research with clear industrial objectives, thereby supporting and driving innovation and development in various industries.
Eligibility and Requirements
The leading organization for the project must be a legal or non-legal entity registered in Shanghai, Jiangsu, or Anhui provinces, possessing strong capabilities and conditions for research and development, organizing scientific research, and promoting project implementation.
Projects related to the guidelines of the respective provinces must be led by institutions from those provinces, while other provincial institutions are encouraged to participate as subtopic units or collaborators in joint research.
The project implementation period must not exceed 5 years.
The budget preparation should consider the existing resources and supporting conditions of the applying institution, based on the actual needs of the project objectives.
Application Process:
Applying institutions should organize their submissions in project form according to the guide’s content, with the option to include subtopics under each project. Each project must be submitted as a whole, covering all research content specified in the relevant guideline direction. Each project should designate one principal investigator, and each subtopic should have one leader; the project leader may also serve as the leader of one subtopic.
The project proposal should include relevant agreements and commitments. The leading institution must sign a joint application agreement with all participating entities, specifying the agreement’s signing date. Additionally, the applying institution and the project leader must sign a statement of integrity and other required commitments.
The application information will be pre-reviewed by the Shanghai Municipal Science and Technology Commission, Jiangsu Provincial Department of Science and Technology, and Anhui Provincial Department of Science and Technology, and will be recommended collectively by the task force .
Language: Chinese
Internal Deadline: 12:00 pm, Monday, November 11, 2024
NOTE!
If you would like to get more information about this call for proposal, please log into your personal account and find the guidelines in the system.
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity as the PI (DKU as the leading institution), please contact Research Support Office ASAP so we could generate the application forms in the system for you so you could reach out to collaborating institutions for this project.
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity as a participant (DKU as the collaborating institution), please reach out to your collaborators and work with them to get all required documents so RSO could process for stamping.
